subcodes.title: Words to a museum watchman, spoken on 1912-07-09
subcodes.first_line: No, I am tired of going about looking at the things of this world: I want to go above and travel and see in the spiritual worlds.... When you go upstairs in a house you do not leave the house. The lower floor is under you.
subcodes.subjects: @realms of being; three realms; five realms, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
